data.label: react-native-mmkv
data.description: react-native-mmkv 是一个库，可让你通过到原生 C++ 库的快速直接 JS 绑定，在 React Native 应用中轻松使用 MMKV。

data.label: react-native-mmkv
data.description: react-native-mmkv is a library that allows you to easily use MMKV inside your React Native app through fast and direct JS bindings to the native C++ library.
